Total revenue for the fiscal year was $81,462 million, an increase of 51% compared with the prior year, driven by higher vehicle deliveries. Automotive revenue was $71,462 million, while energy generation and storage revenue was $3,909 million. Cost of revenue increased to $60,609 million as production scaled across multiple factories. Gross profit was $20,853 million, representing a gross margin of approximately 25.6%, a decrease from 27.1% in the prior year. Net income attributable to common stockholders was $12,556 million, up from $5,519 million year over year. Cash and cash equivalents totaled $16,253 million at year end. Total assets were $82,338 million. The accompanying notes are an integral part of these consolidated financial statements.
